description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with several trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat roof and a light-colored exterior, with large windows distributed asymmetrically along the walls. A driveway leads to a covered carport, and there is a visible blue car parked in front. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a small pool, while the front yard is lined with tall, slender trees. The overall layout is open and spacious, with clear separation between the living areas and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed single-story bungalow with a fenced yard, carport, patio, and pool, featuring large windows and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport with a blue car, main entrance, and a row of trees along the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, patio area, and the wooden fence enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio furniture, pool, and asymmetrical window arrangement on the back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, driveway, and the arrangement of trees and fence along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
